prescribing_information_pk_pd.infusion_rate_ramp: Gradual ramp-up over 1st hour to prevent infusion reactions
prescribing_information_pk_pd.immunogenicity_ada_rates: Up to 91% of patients develop Anti-Drug Antibodies (ADA), typically plateauing by Week 12. Model indicates ADA decreases free serum clearance but does not alter tissue cellular endocytosis via M6P receptors.
